item.name: Dark Nautilus
item.description:
Known for its ability to survive on aether alone, researchers are willing to part with huge sums of gil for live samples.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: This mollusk is able to absorb and process aether through its gills in such a way that it may forgo eating for days at a time─weeks if necessary. A remarkable trait researchers have been eager to incorporate into submarine propulsion systems.
